top_signals.title: ABB Introduces Quay Crane Automation Solution
top_signals.summary: ABB has introduced Waterside Automation solution, which enables quay cranes to perform a larger share of container handling operations automatically. By automating operations over the vessel and reducing the need for continuous manual control…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
